name: Sunset Engine — San Diego rooftop sunset viewpoints (researched)

properties.name: Top of the Hyatt
properties.note: 40 stories up, the tallest waterfront bar on the West Coast: floor-to-ceiling glass over the bay to Coronado, Point Loma and the WNW sunset.

properties.name: Top of the Market
properties.note: Second-floor deck above the harbor with open views from Coronado to Point Loma; clear-night sunsets straight over the water.

properties.name: Coasterra
properties.note: Waterline patio on a point of Harbor Island; the setting WNW sun behind you lights the downtown skyline and bay shell-pink at golden hour.

properties.name: Harbor & Sky
properties.note: 5th-floor bayfront terrace with cabanas and firepits; panoramic bay-and-skyline views, USS Midway close-up, happy-hour-into-sunset over the water.

properties.name: Garibaldi
properties.note: 4th-floor bayfront terrace with Sardinian pasta-and-Negroni vibes and golden-hour views straight over San Diego Bay.

properties.name: Topsail
properties.note: Intimate rooftop over the Embarcadero with the harbor, sailboats, Maritime Museum and Midway below; low, close sunset over the water.

properties.name: Rooftop by STK (Rooftop600)
properties.note: Largest Gaslamp rooftop deck: 360° skyline, firepits and a distant ocean glimpse, but sunset is over downtown, not water.

properties.name: Float
properties.note: 4th-floor Gaslamp pool deck with cabanas and firepits facing the harbor and Coronado Bridge; golden-hour skyline glow more than open-water sunset.
